papers.title_en: MedBench: Deliberative Evaluation of Medical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了MedBench，这是一个旨在将医疗语言模型作为“深思熟虑的代理”而非单纯预测器进行评估的新型基准。该基准涵盖了来自6个医疗问答数据集的19,625个问题，对8个参数规模在4B到32B之间的模型进行了全面测试。MedBench通过模拟复杂的临床决策过程，为评估医疗大模型在实际应用中的推理和决策能力提供了更深入的视角和更严谨的评价体系。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce MedBench, a benchmark for evaluating medical language models asdeliberating agents rather than isolated predictors. MedBench evaluates eightmodels (4B? 32B) on 19,625 questions from six medical QA datasets using …

papers.title_en: Dual-Latent Memory Routing for Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在长文本生成过程中容易丢失早期视觉证据、导致推理性能下降的问题，本文提出了双潜空间记忆路由（Dual-Latent Memory Routing）机制。该方法通过优化视觉信息的存储与检索路径，增强了模型对长程视觉上下文的保持能力。研究表明，该机制能显著提升模型在复杂视觉语言推理任务中的表现，有效解决了长序列生成中的视觉遗忘挑战。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently made strong progress invision-language reasoning, yet their performance often degrades as generationsgrow longer. A key factor is that they frequently lose track of earlier visual evidence …

papers.title_en: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.tldr: 针对大规模语言模型在异构数据上训练时面临的收敛速度与领域覆盖平衡问题，本文提出了一种基于分区拟阵约束梯度匹配的小批量选择方法。该方法通过在梯度匹配框架中引入分区拟阵约束，确保在优化收敛效率的同时，能够兼顾不同数据领域的代表性。研究贡献在于提供了一种兼顾效率与多样性的样本筛选新机制，实验证明其在提升模型性能方面优于现有方法。
papers.abstract_en: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selectingminibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains.Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on …

papers.title_en: LoopCoder: Scaling Code Intelligence via Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在复杂算法推理方面的局限性，本文提出了 LoopCoder。该方法借鉴了通用 Transformer 的思想，通过循环语言模型架构来增强代码智能。LoopCoder 不再单纯依赖增加模型深度和参数量，而是通过循环迭代机制提升逻辑推理能力，在保持参数效率的同时显著提高了代码生成和算法问题的解决性能，为代码智能的扩展提供了新方向。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models (LLMs) have mastered syntax-level code generation,complex algorithmic reasoning remains a challenge, typically addressed by scalingmodel depth and parameter count. Universal Transformers (UT) offer a compelling …

papers.title_en: Towards Multimodal Large Language Models with Both Training and Inference Efficiency
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在训练与推理效率之间难以兼得的问题，深入分析了嵌入空间对齐（如LLaVA）与交叉注意力机制等不同架构的优劣。文章提出了一种兼顾双重效率的新型架构，旨在解决现有模型推理缓慢或训练成本高昂的痛点。该方法在保持高性能的同时，显著提升了模型的实用性，为高效多模态学习提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) mainly fall into two architectures, eachinvolving a trade-off between training and inference efficiency: embedding spacealignment (eg LLaVA series) is inefficient during inference, while cross-attention …

papers.title_en: CofactGVR: Counterfactual Intervention for Grounded Visual Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大模型在定位视觉推理（GVR）中缺乏中间定位信号且易产生捷径解的问题，提出了CofactGVR框架。该方法通过引入反事实干预机制，为模型提供更有效的学习信号，增强了推理过程中的定位准确性。实验证明，该方法能显著提升模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现和鲁棒性，为实现更可靠的视觉推理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Despite rapid progress in Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) with MLLMs and RL-style fine-tuning, existing approaches often lack effective learning signals forintermediate grounding decisions and are prone to shortcut solutions. In this work …

papers.title_en: Evaluating Large Language Models for RDF Knowledge Graph-Related Tasks—The LLM-KG-Bench-Framework 3
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了 LLM-KG-Bench-Framework 3，这是一个专门用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在 RDF 知识图谱相关任务中表现的基准测试框架。该框架涵盖了从 SPARQL 查询生成到知识提取等多种任务，旨在解决当前缺乏标准化评估工具的问题。通过该框架，研究者可以系统地分析不同模型在处理结构化语义数据时的优劣，为知识图谱与大模型的融合提供了重要的参考依据。
papers.abstract_en:
arXiv did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: SVR-UNet: Frequency-Aware View-Routed Analysis-Synthesis Sampling for 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对 3D 医学图像分割中各向异性体积和精细结构导致的混叠及边界模糊问题，本文提出了 SVR-UNet。该模型引入了频率感知和视图路由的分析-合成采样机制，旨在优化编码器-解码器结构中的特征提取与恢复。通过在频域内进行多视图路由采样，SVR-UNet 能够更有效地保留解剖细节并增强边界稳定性，为复杂临床场景下的精准分割提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate 3D medical image segmentation remains challenging for anisotropicclinical volumes and fine anatomical structures, where conventional encoder-decoder sampling often causes aliasing, boundary attenuation, and unstable detail …

papers.title_en: Pretreatment multiparametric MRI-based habitat radiomics and 2.5 D deep learning for predicting early complete response to induction chemoimmunotherapy in …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并外部验证一种基于治疗前多参数MRI的综合影像模型，用于预测患者对诱导化疗免疫治疗的早期完全缓解。该模型创新性地整合了常规影像组学、生境影像组学及2.5D深度学习特征。研究结果表明，这种多维度特征融合的方法能有效提升预测性能，为临床制定个体化治疗方案提供了有力的影像学支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop and externally validate a pretreatment multiparametric MRI-based combined imaging model integrating conventional radiomics, habitatradiomics, and 2.5 D deep learning features for predicting early complete response …

papers.title_en: TopoSFI-MUNet: a topological spatial–frequency interaction network for cross-modal medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究提出TopoSFI-MUNet，一种用于跨模态医学图像分割的拓扑空间-频率交互网络。针对不同模态提供的互补组织结构和病变信息，该模型通过引入空间与频率域的拓扑交互机制，有效融合多源图像特征。实验证明，该方法显著提升了对病变区域的识别与定位能力，为多模态医学影像分析提供了更精准的分割方案。
papers.abstract_en: Since different imaging modalities provide complementary tissue structure and lesioninformation, multi-modal medical image semantic segmentation can significantlyimprove the ability to identify and locate lesion regions by fusing multi-source image …

papers.tldr: 本研究针对生成式语言模型中嵌入矩阵随词表增大而导致参数冗余的问题，提出了 MultiHashFormer。该方法利用多重哈希技术将词项映射至压缩的向量空间，打破了参数量与词表大小的线性依赖。实验表明，该模型在大幅减少嵌入层参数的同时，仍能保持优异的生成性能，为超大规模词表的高效建模提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Language models (LMs) represent tokens using embedding matrices that scalelinearly with the vocabulary size. To constrain the parameter footprint, prior workproposes hashing many tokens into a single vector within encoder-only models …

papers.title_en: Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了离散扩散语言模型在放射报告自动起草中的应用。针对传统自回归模型仅能从左至右生成的局限，该方法利用双向去噪技术，实现了更灵活的文本生成与交互式编辑。实验表明，该模型在保持生成质量的同时，显著提升了放射科医生在报告修订过程中的效率，为医疗基础模型的发展提供了新方向。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvasbidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive withautoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost …

papers.title_en: Scene Graph Thinking: Reinforcing Structured Visual Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大模型（MLLM）在处理复杂场景时忽视物体间结构化关系的问题，提出了“场景图思维”（Scene Graph Thinking）。该方法通过引入场景图来增强模型的结构化视觉推理能力，使模型能够理解物体间的空间与功能联系。实验证明，该方法显著提升了模型在目标导航等需要复杂推理任务中的表现，为增强MLLM的逻辑推理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong perceptionand reasoning capabilities. However, most existing models focus on isolated objectsand neglect structured relationships for efficient target navigation, limiting their …
